home.title: Illuminate the signal moving beneath your present season.
home.subtitle: Enter your birth date and set a clear intention to generate a SigilLab reading tuned for clarity, healing, focus, and the emotional tone of the moment.
featureCards: Celestial atmosphere with grounded ritual inputs.
Intention-led signal generation in a single step.
Built mobile-first for a quick reading flow.
home.formTitle: Tune the ritual, then generate your signal.
home.privacyNote: Your birth date is translated locally before navigation so the result route only receives lower-sensitivity profile fields while defaulting language from the current app config.
home.transitionMessage: Hold your intention steady while the seal gathers form around your present season.

result.journalPromptsTitle: Carry the signal forward with a quieter question.
result.shareTransitionTitle: Preparing your sigil for the outer world...
result.shareTransitionMessage: A luminous share card is being lifted into view so the signal can travel cleanly.
result.fallbackNotice: Live generation failed and fallback mode is disabled, so this page is showing a stable failure response instead of mock content.

share.title: Let the seal travel.
share.subtitle: This card is shaped for screenshots, blessings, and return paths. Keep the ritual close, then send it onward without breaking the atmosphere.
share.onlineCtaDescription: Carry this exact seal into a story, a message thread, or a private screenshot.
share.shareText: A sigil was revealed for me today. May clarity travel with you.
share.saveSuccessMessage: The sigil has been sealed into your keeping.
share.saveSuccessDetail: Keep it close while the current still answers to your name.
share.saveFailureDetail: Preserve this sigil before the energy fades. If the seal cannot be captured here, keep it with a screenshot from the page itself.
share.saveHint: Preserve this sigil before the energy fades. If the seal does not download, hold it on screen and keep a screenshot close.
share.shareSuccessMessage: The seal now travels beyond your path.
share.shareSuccessDetail: The blessing now moves beyond your own circle.
share.copySuccessMessage: Your blessing has been folded into the clipboard.
share.copySuccessDetail: The blessing text is ready to be placed wherever you want the seal to travel next.
share.copyFallbackDetail: Native share closed its gate, so the blessing has been copied for manual sending instead.
share.shareFailureMessage: The blessing could not leave your device this time.
share.rewardHint: Share light, and more light may return.
share.privacyNotice: Only the symbol is shared. Your private details remain with you.
share.sharedMissingTitle: This seal has faded from the circle.
share.sharedMissingSubtitle: The shared sigil can no longer be recovered, but a new reading can still be cast from the beginning.
